userMessage: Set CH1 to 500mV DC 50 ohm and CH2 to 1V AC coupled

flow.name: Set CH1 and CH2 Vertical/Input Settings
flow.description: Partial flow with only the verified CH1 50 ohm termination applied. CH1/CH2 scale and CH2 AC coupling were requested but exact SCPI was not fully verified in this turn.

params.text: Verified only: CH1 termination can be set with CH<x>:TERmination. Exact verified SCPI for requested channel coupling was not obtained in this turn, so those write steps were intentionally not emitted.
